title: Amazon Cognito User Pool
description: Schema representing an Amazon Cognito user pool configuration and its properties.

Id.description: The unique identifier for the user pool.

Name.description: The name of the user pool.

Status.description: The status of the user pool.

Arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) for the user pool.

CreationDate.description: The date and time when the user pool was created.

LastModifiedDate.description: The date and time when the user pool was last modified.

EstimatedNumberOfUsers.description: A number estimating the size of the user pool.

Policies.description: The policies associated with the user pool.

PasswordPolicy.description: The password policy for the user pool.

MinimumLength.description: The minimum length of the password.

RequireUppercase.description: Whether the password must contain at least one uppercase letter.

RequireLowercase.description: Whether the password must contain at least one lowercase letter.

RequireNumbers.description: Whether the password must contain at least one number.

RequireSymbols.description: Whether the password must contain at least one symbol.

TemporaryPasswordValidityDays.description: The number of days a temporary password is valid.

AutoVerifiedAttributes.description: The attributes that are automatically verified.

UsernameAttributes.description: Specifies whether email addresses or phone numbers can be used as user names when a user signs up.

SchemaAttributes.description: The schema attributes for the user pool.

AttributeDataType.description: The data type of the attribute.

Mutable.description: Whether the attribute can be changed after creation.

Required.description: Whether the attribute is required during user registration.

EmailConfiguration.description: The email configuration for the user pool.

SourceArn.description: The ARN of a verified email address in Amazon SES.

ReplyToEmailAddress.description: The destination to which the receiver of the email should reply.

EmailSendingAccount.description: Specifies whether Amazon Cognito emails your users by using its built-in email functionality or your Amazon SES email configuration.

SmsConfiguration.description: The SMS configuration for the user pool.

SnsCallerArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the Amazon SNS caller.

SnsRegion.description: The AWS Region to use with Amazon SNS integration.

UserPoolTags.description: The tags that are assigned to the user pool.

AllowAdminCreateUserOnly.description: Set to true if only the administrator is allowed to create user profiles.

UnusedAccountValidityDays.description: The user account expiration limit, in days, after which the account is no longer usable.
